item.title: Post
item.description: Yo, I’m Eduardo Paixão, also known as “Darccau”. I am currently an IT student at Universidade Federal do Rio Grande do Norte, focusing on cyber security and computer networks. I am also formed as a network technician, this allowed me to work with network infrastructure at SINFO performing network management tasks. I currently work at the same company, but now at the Security Incident Response and Treatment Center where I perform offensive security tests, and task automaion.

item.title: Buffer Overflow Exploitation
